description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has multiple jobs: build, build-cross-win64, docs, lint, and check-pr. The build job runs on a matrix of OS, GCC versions, and plugins, setting up Python, installing dependencies, and building DFHack. The build-cross-win64 job cross-compiles win64 artifacts. The docs job builds documentation. The lint job checks code style and syntax. The check-pr job verifies that a pull request is based on the develop branch.
